_definition.ISO_639_3_eng: Codes for the representation of names of scripts, four character code.

_description.ISO_639_3_eng: [ISO 15924]([ISO 15924 - Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_15924)), is an [international standard](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_standard "ISO standard") defining codes for [writing systems](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Writing_systems "Writing systems") or *scripts* (a *set of graphic characters used for the written form of one or more languages*). Each script is given both a four-letter code and a numeric code.

_definition.ISO_639_3_eng: Codes for the representation of names of scripts, numeric code.

_description.ISO_639_3_eng: [ISO 15924]([ISO 15924 - Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_15924)), is an [international standard](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_standard "ISO standard") defining codes for [writing systems](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Writing_systems "Writing systems") or *scripts* (a *set of graphic characters used for the written form of one or more languages*). Each script is given both a four-letter code and a three character numeric code.
